description: Feishu/Lark MCP server + CLI tool. 85 tools, 3 auth layers. Send as user via cookie+protobuf.
name: io.github.zhuzhen-team/feishu-user-plugin

environmentVariables.description: Feishu web session cookie. Required for user-identity messaging tools (send_to_user, send_as_user, etc).
environmentVariables.name: LARK_COOKIE

environmentVariables.description: Feishu Open Platform self-built app App ID (cli_xxxxxxxxxxxx). Required for Official API tools (docs, bitable, wiki, drive, calendar, tasks, OKR, group messaging).
environmentVariables.name: LARK_APP_ID

environmentVariables.description: Feishu Open Platform self-built app App Secret. Used together with LARK_APP_ID.
environmentVariables.name: LARK_APP_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: User OAuth UAT for P2P chat reading and as user-owner on resource creation. Obtained via 'npx feishu-user-plugin oauth'.
environmentVariables.name: LARK_USER_ACCESS_TOKEN
